seoTitle: Luc Rousseau | Senior full stack developer resume (WordPress, React)
seoDescription: Luc Rousseau's resume as a senior full stack developer: custom and headless WordPress, Gutenberg blocks in React, React/Next.js, Laravel and APIs. 26 years of code. Quebec and remote.
tagline: Custom development: custom and headless WordPress, React and Next.js, Laravel and APIs. Clean, tested, shipped code.

summary.title: Profile
summary.content:
Senior full stack developer, 26 years in the craft, I build custom: decoupled architectures, custom and headless WordPress, React, Next.js and Vue frontends, Laravel and PHP backends on APIs.

On WordPress I work at the engineering level: themes and plugins built from scratch, Gutenberg blocks in React, an API-driven headless CMS. No page builder, no purchased template. Public reference repo on GitHub (lucrousseau/Luc-Rousseau-Consulting); continuous delivery (CI/CD), performance and maintenance.

items.summary: Custom development and architecture for growing teams.
bullets: Decoupled and headless architectures: WordPress or Laravel as an API backend, React, Next.js or Vue frontends.
Engineering-grade WordPress: custom themes and plugins, Gutenberg blocks in React, API contracts.
Performance, caching and scalability; phased technical-debt reduction.
Sustainable delivery: Git, CI/CD, code reviews and a quality bar.
Public reference repo (GitHub) for the Next.js/React site: architecture, tests, quality hooks.
items.stack: WordPress (headless and custom), Laravel, React, Next.js, Vue, PHP, JavaScript ES6+, Gutenberg, REST APIs, MySQL, CI/CD

items.summary: Request-management program on a headless CMS, deployed across partner-brand subdomains.
bullets: Built application processes and systems on a headless CMS; user-data management systems.
Real-time dashboards (progress and status), deployed across the network's subdomains.
Integration, deployment and maintenance in existing web ecosystems; consistent performance and reliability.
Team: 3 developers, 1 DevOps consultant, plus staff on parallel projects alongside the dev initiative.
items.stack: Headless WordPress, Gutenberg, React, PHP, MySQL, REST APIs, CI/CD

bullets: System architecture for loan analysis and comparison; phased planning (milestones, deliverables, timelines).

UI prototypes and wireframes with designers; A/B testing and data-analysis tooling.
